bead.title: FEAT-008 P3: US-095 Actions panel (Drain / Align / Checks)
bead.description: On nodes/[nodeId]/projects/[projectId]/+page.svelte, add <section role=region aria-label=Actions> with three buttons. Drain uses workerDispatch(kind: 'execute-loop'). Each opens ConfirmDialog showing queueSummary context. Confirm fires dispatch, shows spinner, replaces button with link to worker detail page. Failures render role=alert with error text. Disabled state uses <span>-wrapped button + Tooltip with role=tooltip. Commit screenshot baselines (both themes) for project overview.
bead.acceptance: e2e/actions.spec.ts 5/5 green; light+dark screenshots committed for project overview.
